title: calophyllum calaba
intro: Calophyllum calaba, also known as the Calabash tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical forests of Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi, making it effective against various infections. The health benefits of Calophyllum calaba include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for cardiovascular health and immune system support. Herbal preparations of Calophyllum calaba often involve extracting its essential oils or using its leaves and bark to create teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
